extraction.one_line_summary: BOUWMAN Koen won stage 19 from a breakaway with 12 minutes advantage after BORA-hansgrohe stopped chasing, while GC remained deadlocked at 3 seconds.
tactical_patterns: BORA-hansgrohe abandoned chase after building peloton tempo early, suggesting team prioritized saving energy for stage 20 mountains.
GC group neutralized attacks inside 3km on final climb, indicating reluctance to commit before decisive Dolomites stage.
Breakaway given 12 minutes despite tight GC because INEOS had no stage interest and rivals conserved for Marmolada.

rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: secured second stage win and mathematically clinched KOM, demonstrating superior climbing endurance over repeated breakaway efforts
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: attacked final climb but gap immediately closed, showing no separation power on moderate gradients
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: matched every move in final 3km, confirming equal form to CARAPAZ before decisive stage
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: briefly gapped top two GC riders but was reeled back, revealing insufficient margin at current condition
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: abandoned with suspected gastroenteritis when climbing started, eliminating key INEOS domestique support for CARAPAZ
rider_signals.AFFINI Edoardo: positive: paced breakaway on flat to build 8.5-minute gap before climb, demonstrating elite lead-out diesel capabilities
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: neutral: positioned as last CARAPAZ domestique on final climb, indicating thin INEOS climbing support depth
